title: Tianhui Plastics Group was awarded the “Golden Customer of the Year 2020” by Sinopec Corporation
contentHtml:
On November 3, Sinopec Chemical Sales Company's "2021 Market Seminar and Customer Symposium" was held in Xining, Qinghai. Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Group was invited to participate in the conference and won the title of "Golden Customer of the Year 2020".

At the meeting, Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Plastics Group, came to the stage to receive the award and thanked Sinopec Chemical Sales Company for its care and support for the business development of Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastics Group over the years.
titleZh: 天晖塑料集团获评中石化公司 “2020年度金牌客户”
contentHtmlZh:
11月3日，中国石化化工销售公司“2021市场研讨暨客户座谈会”在青海西宁召开。秦皇岛天晖塑料集团应邀参会并荣获“2020年度金牌客户”称号。

会上，天晖塑料集团董事长曾胜文上台领奖并感谢了中国石化化工销售公司多年来对秦皇岛天晖塑料集团业务发展的关心和支持。
